description: Short-term rental analytics and market intelligence platform providing revenue estimates, market performance data, and dynamic pricing recommendations for Airbnb and vacation rental properties.

tools.name: get_rental_estimate
tools.description: Calculates projected short-term rental revenue estimates for a specific property based on its physical characteristics and location.

address.description: The full street address of the property (e.g., '123 Main St, Austin, TX 78701').

bedrooms.description: The number of bedrooms in the property.

bathrooms.description: The number of bathrooms in the property.

estimated_revenue.description: The projected annual rental revenue in USD based on market comparables.

average_daily_rate.description: Average Daily Rate - the projected average rental price per booked night in USD.

occupancy_rate.description: The projected percentage of available nights that will be booked (0-100).

confidence_score.description: A statistical confidence metric (0-1) indicating the reliability of the revenue estimate based on available comparable data.

tools.name: get_market_data
tools.description: Retrieves aggregate short-term rental market analytics and performance metrics for a specified geographic area.

market_score.description: AirDNA's proprietary market attractiveness score indicating investment potential.

average_adr.description: Average Daily Rate - the market-wide average rental price per booked night in USD.

average_occupancy.description: The market-wide average percentage of available nights that were booked (0-100).

active_listings.description: The total count of active short-term rental listings in the specified market.

revpar.description: Revenue Per Available Room - the average revenue generated per available night across all listings in USD.

tools.name: get_listing_data
tools.description: Fetches historical performance metrics for a specific Airbnb property listing.

airbnb_property_id.description: The unique identifier of the Airbnb property listing.

property_id.description: The unique identifier of the Airbnb property listing.

revenue_ltm.description: Total rental revenue generated over the last 12 months in USD.

occupancy_ltm.description: The percentage of available nights that were booked over the last 12 months (0-100).

adr_ltm.description: Average Daily Rate - the average rental price per booked night over the last 12 months in USD.

number_of_reviews.description: The total count of guest reviews for the property.

rating.description: The average guest review rating (typically 0-5 scale).

tools.name: get_smart_rates
tools.description: Generates dynamic pricing recommendations and demand forecasts for optimizing nightly rates over a specified date range.

airbnb_property_id.description: The unique identifier of the Airbnb property listing.

start_date.description: The start date for pricing recommendations in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

end_date.description: The end date for pricing recommendations in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

recommendations.description: A chronological list of daily pricing recommendations for the specified date range.

date.description: The date for which the recommendation applies in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

recommended_rate.description: The suggested optimal nightly rate in USD for this date.

tools.name: search_markets
tools.description: Searches the AirDNA database for available markets and geographic regions.

query.description: Search query string for finding markets (e.g., city name, neighborhood, or region).

markets.description: List of markets matching the search query.

market_id.description: The unique identifier of the market in the AirDNA database.

market_name.description: The display name of the market (e.g., 'Downtown Austin').

state.description: The two-letter US state abbreviation where the market is located.
